zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Strangways於大約1413年出生在英國越可爾斯亞頓時，她的父親James Strangways I33歲，母親Joan Orrell28歲。她於1428年7月1日之前與Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年2月20日之後在英國藍卡爾布萊恩，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Strangways于大约1413年出生在英国越可爾斯亞頓时，她的父亲James Strangways I33岁，母亲Joan Orrell28岁。她于1428年7月1日之前与Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年2月20日之后在英国藍卡爾布萊恩，埋葬在英国英格兰爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Strangways
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Strangeway
meanings: English: locative from Strangeways in Manchester (Lancs), probably ‘(place by) a stream with a strong current’: Old English strang + (ge)wæsc.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Strangways was born about 1413, in Sneaton, Yorkshire, England, her father, James Strangways I, was 33 and her mother, Joan Orrell, was 28. She married Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn before 1 July 1428, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 20 February 1449, in Bryn, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Strangways est née environ 1413, à Sneaton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, James Strangways I, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Orrell, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn avant 1 juillet 1428, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 20 février 1449, à Bryn, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Strangways um 1413 in Sneaton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Strangways I 33 und ihre Mutter Joan Orrell 28. Sie hat vor 1. Juli 1428 in Lancashire, England Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 20. Februar 1449 in Bryn, Lancashire, England und wurde in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Strangways è nata il circa 1413 nel Sneaton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, James Strangways I, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan Orrell, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn prima del 1 luglio 1428, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 20 febbraio 1449, nel Bryn, Lancashire, England, e fu sepolta a Warrington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Strangwaysが約1413年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスネアトンで生まれた時，父James Strangways Iは33歳，母Joan Orrellは28歳であった。1428年7月1日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir Peter Gerard of Brynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年2月20日以後にイギリスランカシュアイアブリンで死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Strangways(이)가 대략 1413년 영국 요르크실르 스니앳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Strangways I(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Orrell(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1428년 7월 1일 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 2월 20일 이후 영국 랭카실르 브린에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Strangways nasceu aproximadamente 1413, em Sneaton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Strangways I, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Orrell, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn antes 1 de julho de 1428, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 20 de fevereiro de 1449, em Bryn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Strangways родилась около 1413 г. в местности снитон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени James Strangways I было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Orrell, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn перед 1 июля 1428 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 20 февраль 1449 г. в местности брин, ланкашир, Англия и была похоронена в местности варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1413–after 20 February 1449: e tusa o le 1413–ina ua ma'ea le 20 Fepuari 1449

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Strangways nació aproximadamente 1413, en Sneaton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Strangways I, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Orrell, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Peter Gerard of Bryn antes de 1 de julio de 1428, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 20 de febrero de 1449, en Bryn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
